title: Consensus sequences of arbovirus COXI amplicons
author: Messenger, Louisa
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: To confirm the taxonomic identity of positive qPCR amplicons, generated with vector colony genomic DNA ( Cx. quinquefasciatus  JHB,  Cx. tarsalis  YOLO and  Ae. aegypti , ROCK strains) from each probe channel were selected for bidirectional chain termination sequencing.
steps_raw: To confirm the taxonomic identity of positive qPCR amplicons, generated with vector colony genomic DNA ( Cx. quinquefasciatus  JHB,  Cx. tarsalis  YOLO and  Ae. aegypti , ROCK strains) from each probe channel were selected for bidirectional chain termination sequencing.
